objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=30)
- adx(period=19)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 25
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 25
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.75
tp_atr_mult: 4.0
description: ATR stop-loss (1.75x) and take-profit (4.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Combining a Bollinger band breakout strategy with an ADX trend filter minimizes the risk of whipsaws in ranging markets, while still allowing for strong trending moves.
This strategy uses the breakout of a Donchian Channel and ADX to enter long and short positions in an uptrending market, with risk management based on ATR.
